title: Church of St. Ann
summary: The Church of Saint Ann or Anne, St. Ann's Church,  St. Anne's Roman Catholic Church or variations may refer to:
text:
The Church of Saint Ann or Anne, St. Ann's Church,  St. Anne's Roman Catholic Church or variations may refer to:

St. Anne's Church, Derviçan
